# Generated by openai (gpt-3.5-turbo)
# Prompt: Write a Deployment Manager template for a complete GCP application stack (Compute Engine, Cloud SQL, Cloud Storage, Load Balancer). Focus on core infrastructure. Skip Cloud Logging and Monitoring configuration to reduce complexity in our initial MVP deployment.
# Category: cloud_monitoring

resources:
- name: compute-instance
  type: compute.v1.instance
  properties:
    zone: us-central1-a
    machineType: zones/us-central1-a/machineTypes/n1-standard-1
    disks:
    - boot: true
      autoDelete: true
      initializeParams:
        sourceImage: projects/ubuntu-os-cloud/global/images/ubuntu-1804-bionic-v20210929
    networkInterfaces:
    - network: global/networks/default

- name: cloud-sql
  type: sqladmin.v1beta4.instance
  properties:
    region: us-central1
    databaseVersion: MYSQL_5_7
    settings:
      tier: db-n1-standard-1

- name: storage-bucket
  type: storage.v1.bucket
  properties:
    location: US

- name: lb-backend-service
  type: compute.v1.backendService
  properties:
    protocol: HTTP
    backends:
    - group: $(ref.compute-instance.selfLink)
    healthChecks:
    - $(ref.health-check.selfLink)
    loadBalancingScheme: INTERNAL

- name: health-check
  type: compute.v1.healthCheck
  properties:
    type: HTTP
    tcpHealthCheck:
      port: 80

- name: lb-url-map
  type: compute.v1.urlMap
  properties:
    defaultRouteAction:
      urlRedirect:
        redirectResponseCode: HTTP_MOVED_TEMP
        httpsRedirect: true
    defaultService: $(ref.lb-backend-service.selfLink)

- name: lb-proxy
  type: compute.v1.targetHttpsProxy
  properties:
    urlMap: $(ref.lb-url-map.selfLink)

- name: lb-global-forwarding-rule
  type: compute.v1.globalForwardingRule
  properties:
    loadBalancingScheme: INTERNAL
    IPAddress: $(ref.lb-proxy.selfLink)
    portRange: 80
    network: global/networks/default
